items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the behavior of the notification system during quiet hours, but there is no direct evidence provided that confirms the system's handling of notifications during the specified time frame (10pm-8am). The linked use case discusses notification cadence but does not provide specific evidence related to the quiet hours scenario. Therefore, the outcome of this exploratory step cannot be determined based on the available information.
